message:
test(fcp-sandbox): add WASI hostcall integration tests for filesystem, clocks, and network

Add comprehensive no-mock integration tests that exercise the WASI
preview2 hostcall implementations directly through wasmtime store
handles, verifying that the sandbox policy layer enforces constraints
at the hostcall boundary rather than just at the component invocation
level.

Filesystem permissions (1 test):
- Read from readonly preopened directories succeeds
- Write to readonly preopened directories returns not-permitted
- Write to writable preopened directories succeeds and persists
- Path traversal (../) from writable directory is blocked

Deterministic mode (1 test):
- Two stores from the same runtime produce identical wall clock values
- Monotonic clock advances by configured step size per call
- Two stores start monotonic sequence from zero independently
- Deterministic random bytes are identical across stores
- Insecure seed returns the configured seed value

Network policy (1 test):
- Default runtime blocks DNS resolution (resolver-failure)
- Open-constraints runtime allows DNS resolution
- TCP connect to port 443 is allowed, non-standard ports blocked
- TCP bind is always blocked (connectors are clients, not servers)

Also add helper functions (unique_temp_dir, preopen_descriptor,
read_preopened_file, write_preopened_file, open_preopened_for_write_error)
and update CBOR test vectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
